title: After Enies Lobby: Rising Conflict
description: In the Post-Enies Lobby storyline, this section centers on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #10, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #9 as the scene develops across pages 5–8.
scene: This scene advances the Post-Enies Lobby conflict through Unknown person #1, Unknown person #10, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #2, focusing on the immediate stakes of after enies lobby: rising conflict.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: The man behind such amazing technology

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: They're all results from his recent work!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: The world is filled with amazing people!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Eeeee!!? Are you really going back already!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That goes beyond the red line,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Luffy-san, let's meet again over there!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: One day, I'll become a marine... A-

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Then you gotta be one!! of course!!!
